description: Place a fire trap that explodes when an enemy approaches, causing (rangedAttackPower * 0.1 + 263) to (rangedAttackPower * 0.1 + 337) Fire damage and burning all enemies for 450 additional Fire damage over 20 sec to all within 10 yards. Trap will exist for 1 min. Only one trap can be active at a time.
name: Explosive Trap
